attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CXMCII.CARTON_ID, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(CXMCII.MESSAGE_BOM_PACK_ID, CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
CXMCII.PACKOUT_DATE, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(CXMCII.CARTON_DIM_ID, CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(CXMCII.BP_SERIAL_NUMBER,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL), 
CXMCII.WEIGHT, 
CXMCII.HEIGHT, 
CXMCII.LENGTH, 
CXMCII.WIDTH, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(CXMCII.CARTON_DIM_UOM, CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL),
REPLACE(REPLACE(CXMCII.CARTON_WEIGHT_UOM,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL), 
CXMCII.PARENT_CARTON_ID, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(CXMCII.SJ_PROCESS_STATUS,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL), 
REPLACE(REPLACE(CXMCII.PROCESS_STATUS,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL), 
CXMCII.CREATION_DATE, 
CXMCII.CREATED_BY, 
CXMCII.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
CXMCII.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
CXMCII.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
CXMCII.REQUEST_ID, 
CXMCII.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(CXMCII.GLOBAL_NAME ,CHR(13),NULL),CHR(10),NULL)
FROM
 CG1_XXSCM_MK_CARTON_IB_I CXMCII 
WHERE
 CXMCII.GES_UPDATE_DATE>to_date('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
